What I Build

// Areas of focus & expertise
🖥️

Desktop Apps

Native-feeling desktop experiences with Electron, system-level APIs, and offline-first architectures.

ElectronNode.jsFFmpeg
🌐

Web Applications

Full-stack React web apps with real-time features, modern UI frameworks, and production-grade deployments.

ReactViteThree.js
📡

P2P & Real-Time

Peer-to-peer file sharing, WebRTC streaming, and real-time communication systems with zero server dependency.

WebRTCPeerJSSocket.IO
⚙️

Developer Tools

CLI utilities, automation scripts, and dev tooling that solve real problems and save hours of manual work.

PythonGitAutomation

Projects & Links

// Live apps & open source tools
📡
GitHub ↗Launch ↗

Beam P2P

Serverless peer-to-peer file sharing portal using WebRTC for direct device-to-device transfers with zero size boundaries and complete privacy.

  • ⚡ Direct Browser-to-Browser WebRTC Transfers
  • 📁 Zero Size Boundaries & Stream-Saving
  • 🔒 End-to-End Encrypted Peer Links
  • 💎 Free & Premium ($9/mo) Plans with Stripe
LIVE APP
🎵
GitHub ↗Launch ↗

We Plays

Premium glassmorphic desktop music player with integrated YouTube downloader, visualizer, local LAN share, and automatic ID3 metadata fetching.

  • 🎨 Dynamic Album Art Theme Engine
  • 🚀 In-App yt-dlp YouTube Downloader
  • 📶 LAN Offline Media Sharing
  • 🎤 Synchronized Lyrics & Insights
LIVE APP
🎙️
GitHub ↗Launch ↗

VoiceWave

Real-time voice chat application featuring WebRTC audio streaming, Socket.IO room coordination, and an Electron desktop shell.

  • 🎙️ WebRTC Real-Time Audio
  • ⚡ Socket.IO Room Coordination
  • 🖥️ Electron Desktop Shell Integration
  • 🎛️ Ultra Low Latency Connections
LIVE APP
📄
GitHub ↗Launch ↗

JustPDFCraft

Browser-based client-side PDF utility toolkit to merge, split, compress, watermark, protect, and annotate documents locally.

  • 📄 30+ Free PDF & Student Tools
  • 🔒 100% Secure Client-Side Processing
  • 🛠️ Merge, Split & Compress Functionality
  • 🔍 Built-in OCR Text Extraction
WEBSITE
⬇️
GitHub ↗Launch ↗

SnapGrab

Desktop media downloader shell utilizing yt-dlp & FFmpeg. Features concurrent playlist downloads, local file playback, and background engine auto-updates.

  • ⬇️ Downloader for 1,000+ Platforms
  • 🎬 Automated FFmpeg Muxing & Quality Merge
  • ⚡ Background Component Auto-Updates
  • 📻 Built-in Media Playback Shell
LIVE APP
⚡
